name: Central Asia Metals plc
description: Central Asia Metals plc is a UK-domiciled base metals producer with operations in Kazakhstan and North Macedonia. The company's primary assets include the 100% owned Kounrad solvent extraction-electrowinning (SX-EW) copper recovery plant in Kazakhstan, which produces high-grade copper cathode from waste dumps, and the Sasa zinc-lead mine in North Macedonia. Central Asia Metals is committed to low-cost, efficient production and strong environmental, social, and governance (ESG) standards, delivering consistent returns to its shareholders.
